translations.bn: He said: Abul Hasan Ali ibn Bilal al-Mahlabi reported to me from Ali ibn Abdullah al-Isfahani, who reported from Ibrahim ibn Muhammad al-Thaqafi, who reported from Yusuf ibn Sa'id al-Arhabi, who reported from Ubaidullah ibn Musa al-Absi, from Kamil, from Habib ibn Abi Thabit, who said:

translations.bn: When the people entered the house for the consultation, al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad al-Kindi - may Allah bless him with mercy - came and said: "Allow me in with you, for I have sincere counsel for the sake of Allah and something good for you." They refused. Then he said: "Allow my head in and listen to me." They refused him even that. Then he said: "Since you refuse, then do not swear allegiance to a man who did not witness Badr, nor pledge the allegiance of al-Ridwan, and who fled on the day of Uhud when the two groups met."

translations.bn: Uthman said: "By Allah, if authority is given to me, I shall certainly send you back to your first Lord." When death came upon al-Miqdad, he said: "Inform Uthman that I have indeed been returned to my Lord, the First and the Last."

translations.bn: When the news of his death reached Uthman, he came and stood at his grave and said: "May Allah bless you with mercy; you were good, even though you were (my opponent)." He praised him well. Al-Zubair said to him: "You will know me after death when you lament me, while during my lifetime you did not provide me my sustenance." He said: "O Zubair, you say this? Do you think I like to see such a companion of Muhammad, peace be upon him and his progeny, die while he is resentful against me?!"

diacritics_changes: Added tashkeel to common nouns and verbs throughout
Proper nouns retained as in source with minimal additions
Added sukun and shadda where grammatically required

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: 7 - قَال: أَخبرني أَبو اَلحسن عَلي بَن بَلال اَلمهلبي قَال: حَدثنا عَلي بَن عَبد اَلله اَلإصفهاني قَال: حَدثنا إَبراهيم بَن مَحمد اَلثقفي قَال: حَدثنا يَوسف بَن سَعيد اَلأرحبي قَال: حَدثنا عَبيد اَلله بَن مَوسى اَلعبسي ، عَن كَامل، عَن حَبيب اَبن
isnad_matn.matn_ar: أَبي ثَابت قَال: لَما حَضر اَلقوم اَلدار لَلشورى جَاء اَلمقداد بَن اَلأسود اَلكندي رَحمه اَلله فَقال: أَدخلوني مَعكم، فَإن لَله عَندي نَصحا وَلي بَكم خَيرا، فَأبوا، فَقال: أَدخلوا رَأسي وَاسمعوا مَني، فَأبوا عَليه ذَلك، فَقال: أَما إَذا أَبيتم فَلا تَبايعوا رَجلا لَم يَشهد بَدرا، وَلم يَبايع بَيعة اَلرضوان، وَانهزم يَوم أَحد يَوم اَلتقى اَلجمعان . فَقال عَثمان: أَم وَالله لَئن وَليتها لَأردنك إَلى رَبك اَلأول. فَلما نَزل بَالمقداد اَلموت قَال: أَخبروا عَثمان أَني قَد رَددت إَلى رَبي اَلأول وَالآخر. فَلما بَلغ عَثمان مَوته جَاء حَتى قَام عَلى قَبره فَقال: رَحمك اَلله كَنت وَإن كَنت، يَثني عَليه خَيرا، فَقال لَه اَلزبير: لَأعرفنك بَعد اَلموت تَندبني * وَفي حَياتي مَا زَودتني زَادي فَقال: يَا زَبير تَقول هَذا، أَتراني أَحب أَن يَموت مَثل هَذا مَن أَصحاب مَحمد عَليه اَلسلام وَهو عَلي سَاخط؟!

narrators.known_identity: Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Bilal al-Muhallabi, a hadith transmitter
narrators.name_ar: أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ بِلَالٍ الْمُهَلَّبِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Bilal al-Muhallabi

narrators.known_identity: Ali ibn Abdullah al-Isfahani, a hadith transmitter
Ibrahim ibn Muhammad al-Thaqafi (d. 283 AH), author of Kitab al-Gharat
Yusuf ibn Sa'id al-Arhabi, a hadith transmitter
Ubaidullah ibn Musa al-Absi (d. 213 AH), a known hadith transmitter

narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely Kamil ibn al-Ala, but could be another narrator named Kamil
narrators.known_identity: Kamil, possibly Kamil ibn al-Ala, a Kufan transmitter
Habib ibn Abi Thabit (d. 119 AH), a prominent Kufan scholar and faqih

May Allah have mercy on him

seo_questions.bn: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.de: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.en: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.es: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.fa: مقداد بن الاسود درباره شرایط خلافت به شورا چه گفت؟
seo_questions.fr: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.id: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.ru: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?
seo_questions.tr: Mikdad bin el-Esved Şûra konseyine hilafet konusunda ne söyledi?
seo_questions.ur: مقداد بن الاسود نے شوریٰ کونسل کو خلافت کے بارے میں کیا نصیحت کی؟
seo_questions.zh: What did al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad say to the Shura council about the qualifications for the caliphate?

similar_content_hints.description: Narrations about the Shura consultation after Umar's death where companions voiced objections about candidates' qualifications based on their participation in key early Islamic battles.
Hadiths about al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad's loyalty to Ali ibn Abi Talib and his outspoken defense of Ali's right to the caliphate.
Narrations about companions who maintained their principles even on their deathbeds, showing defiance against what they perceived as injustice.

summaries.bn: Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad attempted to advise the Shura council not to pledge allegiance to anyone who missed Badr, was absent from Bay'at al-Ridwan, and fled at Uhud. Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.
summaries.de: Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad attempted to advise the Shura council not to pledge allegiance to anyone who missed Badr, was absent from Bay'at al-Ridwan, and fled at Uhud. Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.
summaries.en: Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad attempted to advise the Shura council not to pledge allegiance to anyone who missed Badr, was absent from Bay'at al-Ridwan, and fled at Uhud. Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.

Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.
summaries.fa: مقداد بن الاسود کوشید به شورای شورا نصیحت کند که با کسی بیعت نکنند که در بدر و بیعت رضوان حاضر نبوده و از اُحد فرار کرده است. عثمان تهدید کرد اما مقداد در بستر مرگ با شجاعت پاسخ داد.

Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.
summaries.ru: Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad attempted to advise the Shura council not to pledge allegiance to anyone who missed Badr, was absent from Bay'at al-Ridwan, and fled at Uhud. Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.
summaries.tr: Mikdad bin el-Esved, Şûra konseyine Bedir'e katilmamiş, Ridvan biatinda bulunmamiş ve Uhud'da bozguna uğramiş birine biat etmemelerini söyledi. Osman tehdit etti, ancak Mikdad ölüm döşeğinde cesaretle cevap verdi.
summaries.ur: مقداد بن الاسود نے شوریٰ کونسل کو نصیحت کرنے کی کوشش کی کہ ایسے شخص سے بیعت نہ کریں جو بدر اور بیعتِ رضوان میں موجود نہ تھا اور اُحد سے بھاگا تھا۔ عثمان نے دھمکی دی لیکن مقداد نے موت کے وقت دلیری سے جواب دیا۔
summaries.zh: Al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad attempted to advise the Shura council not to pledge allegiance to anyone who missed Badr, was absent from Bay'at al-Ridwan, and fled at Uhud. Uthman threatened him, but on his deathbed al-Miqdad responded defiantly. When Uthman visited his grave and praised him, al-Zubair reminded Uthman of his hypocrisy.

text: 7 - قال: أخبرني أبو الحسن علي بن بلال المهلبي قال: حدثنا علي بن عبد الله الإصفهاني قال: حدثنا إبراهيم بن محمد الثقفي قال: حدثنا يوسف بن سعيد الأرحبي قال: حدثنا عبيد الله بن موسى العبسي ، عن كامل، عن حبيب ابن أبي ثابت  قال: لما حضر القوم الدار للشورى جاء المقداد بن الأسود الكندي رحمه الله فقال: أدخلوني معكم، فإن لله عندي نصحا ولي بكم خيرا، فأبوا، فقال: أدخلوا رأسي واسمعوا مني، فأبوا عليه ذلك، فقال: أما إذا أبيتم فلا تبايعوا رجلا لم يشهد بدرا، ولم يبايع بيعة الرضوان، وانهزم يوم أحد يوم التقى الجمعان . فقال عثمان: أم والله لئن وليتها لأردنك إلى ربك الأول. فلما نزل بالمقداد الموت قال: أخبروا عثمان أني قد رددت إلى ربي الأول والآخر. فلما بلغ عثمان موته جاء حتى قام  على قبره فقال: رحمك الله كنت وإن كنت، يثني عليه خيرا، فقال له الزبير: لأعرفنك بعد الموت تندبني * وفي حياتي ما زودتني زادي  فقال: يا زبير تقول هذا، أتراني أحب أن يموت مثل هذا من أصحاب محمد عليه السلام وهو علي ساخط؟!

en.mulla-asgharali-m-m-jaffer: 7. He said: Abul Hasan ‘Ali ibn Bilal al-Mahlabi reported to me from ‘Ali ibn Abdillah al-Ishfahani, who reported from Ibrahim ibn Muhammad al-Thaqafi who reported from Yusuf ibn Saeed al-Arhabi, who reported from Ubaidullah ibn Musa al-Abasi, from Kamil, from Habib ibn Ibn Abi Thabit, who said: When the people entered the house for consultation (al-Shura), al-Miqdad ibn al-Aswad al-Kindi - may Allah bless him with mercy, said: "Allow me in with you for I am sincere and faithful to Allah and I have something good for you." They refused. Then he said: "Allow me to enter my head and listen to me." They refused even that. Then he said: "If you do not allow me, then (let me advise that) do not swear allegiance to the one who has not witnessed (the battle of) Badr, and who was not present at the allegiance of al-Ridhwan and was routed on the day of Uhud, when the two groups met." Uthman said: "By Allah, if the authority is given to me, I shall indeed, send you back to your first lord." And when al-Miqdad was dying, he said: "Inform Uthman that I am being returned to my first and the last lord!" When Uthman learnt of his death, he came to his grave and said: "May Allah bless you with mercy, you were (good), in spite of what you were (i.e. my opponent)!" Then he praised him. (Upon hearing this) al-Zubair said (to Uthman): "I will let you know me (better) after death, when you lament over me, while during my lifetime, you did not allow me my subsintence." He (i.e. Uthman) said: "O Zubair, you say this? Do you think I like to see such a companion of the Prophet, peace be upon him and his progeny, die while he is resentful against me?"
